title: Runtime Storyboard Console
description: A premium runtime-core demo for segmented timelines, active dependencies, camera moves, and inspection.
name: Runtime Storyboard Console

segments.label: Command Center Hook
segments.code: function render(t, context) { const ctx = context.ctx, w = context.width, h = context.height; const gsap = context.libs?.gsap || globalThis.gsap; const ease = gsap?.parseEase ? gsap.parseEase('expo.out') : function(v){ v = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, v)); return 1 - Math.pow(1 - v, 4); }; const p = ease(context.progress); let g = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, w, h); g.addColorStop(0, '#050812'); g.addColorStop(.52, '#082435'); g.addColorStop(1, '#24162f'); ctx.fillStyle = g; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); ctx.save(); ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'screen'; [['rgba(125,211,252,.42)',360,260,620],['rgba(123,216,143,.30)',1310,770,700],['rgba(250,204,21,.22)',1160,250,520]].forEach((s,i)=>{const rg=ctx.createRadialGradient(s[1]+Math.sin(t+i)*70,s[2]+Math.cos(t*.7+i)*54,0,s[1],s[2],s[3]); rg.addColorStop(0,s[0]); rg.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0)'); ctx.fillStyle=rg; ctx.fillRect(0,0,w,h);}); ctx.restore(); ctx.save(); ctx.globalAlpha=.12; ctx.strokeStyle='#ffffff'; for(let y=120;y<h;y+=68){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(90,y+Math.sin(t+y*.01)*8);ctx.bezierCurveTo(w*.3,y-58,w*.64,y+58,w-90,y-12);ctx.stroke()} ctx.restore(); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(5,12,24,.58)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.roundRect ? ctx.roundRect(102,122,w-204,h-236,42) : ctx.rect(102,122,w-204,h-236); ctx.fill(); ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.16)'; ctx.lineWidth=2; ctx.stroke(); ctx.fillStyle='#ffffff'; ctx.font='900 86px system-ui, sans-serif'; ctx.fillText('Runtime command center',132,364-(1-p)*90); ctx.fillStyle='#bdefff'; ctx.font='800 30px system-ui, sans-serif'; ctx.fillText('segments, active dependencies, camera motion, inspection',138,430); const labels=['timeline','scene graph','camera','adapter']; for(let i=0;i<labels.length;i++){const x=144+i*392,y=622+Math.sin(t+i)*10;ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.075)';ctx.beginPath();ctx.roundRect?ctx.roundRect(x,y,300,90,24):ctx.rect(x,y,300,90);ctx.fill();ctx.strokeStyle=['#7dd3fc','#7bd88f','#facc15','#fb7185'][i];ctx.stroke();ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='900 26px system-ui, sans-serif';ctx.fillText(labels[i],x+28,y+56)} }

segments.label: Inspection Proof
segments.code: function render(t, context) { const ctx = context.ctx, w = context.width, h = context.height; const d3 = context.libs?.d3 || globalThis.d3; const p = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, context.progress)); const ease = 1 - Math.pow(1 - p, 3); const values = [0.22, 0.66, 0.48, 0.88, 0.72, 0.94, 0.58, 0.82]; const scale = d3?.scaleLinear ? d3.scaleLinear().domain([0, 1]).range([0, 450]) : function(v){ return v * 450; }; let g = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, w, h); g.addColorStop(0, '#06111f'); g.addColorStop(.62, '#102638'); g.addColorStop(1, '#141c34'); ctx.fillStyle = g; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff'; ctx.font = '900 58px system-ui, sans-serif'; ctx.fillText('Inspection frame: active segment = proof', 128, 142); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.08)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.roundRect ? ctx.roundRect(120, 204, w - 240, 692, 34) : ctx.rect(120,204,w-240,692); ctx.fill(); ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.16)'; ctx.stroke(); for (let i = 0; i < values.length; i++) { const bar = scale(values[i]) * ease; const x = 238 + i * 190; const y = 794 - bar; const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, y, 0, 794); grad.addColorStop(0, i % 3 === 0 ? '#7dd3fc' : i % 3 === 1 ? '#7bd88f' : '#facc15'); grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(255,255,255,.1)'); ctx.fillStyle = grad; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.roundRect ? ctx.roundRect(x, y, 86, bar, 18) : ctx.rect(x, y, 86, bar); ctx.fill(); } ctx.lineWidth = 8; ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffffff'; ctx.shadowColor = '#7dd3fc'; ctx.shadowBlur = 22; ctx.beginPath(); values.forEach((v, i) => { const x = 281 + i * 190; const y = 794 - scale(v) * .72 * ease + Math.sin(t * 2 + i) * 10; if (i) ctx.lineTo(x, y); else ctx.moveTo(x, y); }); ctx.stroke(); ctx.shadowBlur = 0; ctx.fillStyle = '#facc15'; ctx.font = '900 34px system-ui, sans-serif'; ctx.fillText('d3 scaleLinear -> visible chart geometry', 128, h - 122); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.62)'; ctx.font='700 22px ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, monospace'; ctx.fillText('time=4s  segmentId=proof  dependencies=[canvas2d,d3]',128,h-84); }

segments.label: Camera Depth Lockup
segments.code: function render(t, context) { const ctx = context.ctx, w = context.width, h = context.height; const THREE = context.libs?.THREE || globalThis.THREE; let g = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, w, h); g.addColorStop(0, '#050812'); g.addColorStop(.55, '#171a38'); g.addColorStop(1, '#2c172c'); ctx.fillStyle = g; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, w, h); ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff'; ctx.font = '900 58px system-ui, sans-serif'; ctx.fillText('Camera depth lockup', 128, 142); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.66)'; ctx.font='700 24px system-ui, sans-serif'; ctx.fillText('runtime camera metadata changes the final world matrix',130,180); const pts = []; for (let x = -1; x <= 1; x += 2) for (let y = -1; y <= 1; y += 2) for (let z = -1; z <= 1; z += 2) { let v = THREE?.Vector3 ? new THREE.Vector3(x, y, z) : { x, y, z }; if (v.applyAxisAngle && THREE) { v.applyAxisAngle(new THREE.Vector3(0, 1, 0), t * 1.25); v.applyAxisAngle(new THREE.Vector3(1, 0, 0), t * .75); } const s = 310 / (2.8 + v.z); pts.push({ x: w / 2 + v.x * s * 2.05, y: h / 2 + v.y * s * 2.05, z: v.z }); } const edges = [[0,1],[0,2],[0,4],[3,1],[3,2],[3,7],[5,1],[5,4],[5,7],[6,2],[6,4],[6,7]]; ctx.save(); ctx.lineWidth = 11; ctx.shadowColor = '#7dd3fc'; ctx.shadowBlur = 34; edges.forEach((e, i) => { ctx.strokeStyle = i % 2 ? '#facc15' : '#7dd3fc'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(pts[e[0]].x, pts[e[0]].y); ctx.lineTo(pts[e[1]].x, pts[e[1]].y); ctx.stroke(); }); ctx.restore(); for (let i = 0; i < 26; i++) { ctx.strokeStyle = i % 2 ? 'rgba(123,216,143,.35)' : 'rgba(125,211,252,.26)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.ellipse(w / 2, h / 2 + 250, 218 + i * 24, 40 + i * 4, t * .22 + i * .08, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.stroke(); } ctx.fillStyle='rgba(5,12,24,.62)'; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.roundRect?ctx.roundRect(126,h-184,w-252,92,24):ctx.rect(126,h-184,w-252,92); ctx.fill(); ctx.fillStyle = '#7bd88f'; ctx.font = '900 30px system-ui, sans-serif'; ctx.fillText('inspect time 7s -> activeSegmentId depth', 156, h - 126); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.62)'; ctx.font='700 20px ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, monospace'; ctx.fillText('camera.z=-170  zoom=1.10  dependency=THREE',156,h-96); }
